assumptions.title: Team stored as NPC ID array on GameState
Saves list returns slot metadata only
NPC endpoint returns live GameState data when game active
New routes added to existing plugins
Change validateGameState return to result object

decisions.title: Team composition rules
decisions.context: When the player picks their party (2 of 3 NPCs), should they be able to swap at any time or lock during activities?
decisions.user_input: It should be locked during the demo, and in the future, should be locked during combat and narrative scenes. POST /api/player/team returns error if combatState !== null or narrativeState !== null.

decisions.title: validateGameState return type change
decisions.context: How to report specific validation failure details
options: Keep boolean + throw on first failure
decisions.chosen: Change to ValidationResult object: { valid: true } | { valid: false; errors: string[] }

decisions.title: NPC endpoint data source
decisions.context: Whether GET /api/npc/:id returns template or live GameState data
options: Return live state when game active, template otherwise
decisions.chosen: Return live GameState NPC when game active, template otherwise. NPC type is identical for both — no merging needed.

decisions.title: Error code for corrupt save validation failure
decisions.context: What error code to use when validateGameState fails on load
decisions.chosen: Reuse existing VALIDATION_ERROR with descriptive message from validation result

decisions.title: Where to add team field to GameState
decisions.context: Location for the new team field
decisions.chosen: Add readonly team: readonly string[] directly to GameState in src/types/index.ts

decisions.title: Combat state validation depth
decisions.context: How deeply to validate CombatState structure on save load
decisions.chosen: Top-level shape only — check round, phase, status enums, and that arrays exist. Combat state is transient and created by the engine, so deep corruption is unlikely.
